title: Xtra Citrusy Japanese Matcha Onigiri
description: A citrusy and aerated solo dinner Japanese dish featuring matcha, with a shio-koji cure and egg-free friendly ingredients, formed into onigiri.
instructions: Rinse the Japanese short grain rice thoroughly and cook according to the package instructions.
In a small bowl, whisk together the matcha powder, shio-koji, yuzu juice, salt, and sugar until well combined.
Once the rice is cooked, allow it to cool down to room temperature.
Mix the matcha mixture into the cooled rice and stir until the rice is evenly coated.
Prepare a small bowl of water for dampening your hands.
Dampen your hands with water and shape the rice mixture into small triangular onigiri shapes.
Wrap each onigiri with a noru sheet, if desired.
Serve the Xtra Citrusy Japanese Matcha Onigiri at room temperature.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to a day.
